title: Vasco da Gama Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Vasco da Gama with a Z-Score of +3.66. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Vasco da Gama is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The high temperatures, with a CDD of 11.8 GG, are resulting in increased energy consumption and health risks. 
 The humidity level of 78% and wind speed of 17.7 km/h are exacerbating the situation, making it feel even hotter.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical heat wave.
